text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 
27 
DED_COSTSHARE_TIERS 
LABEL: 
Tiers with Cost Sharing in the Deductible Phase 
DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies which formulary tiers require beneficiary cost sharing during the deductible 
phase. 
The value contains a string of binary digits; each digit of the value indicates which tiers are on the 
formulary. 
SHORT NAME: — 
LONG NAME: DED_COSTSHARE_TIERS 
TYPE: 
CHAR
